title: K리그1, 시즌 개막전 일정 확정
summary: K리그1이 시즌 최종 라운드 경기 일정을 확정하고 공지했습니다.
content: K League 1 announced the final match schedule for this season. All matches will be played simultaneously for fair competition. The championship race remains tight among top teams. Fans are expected to fill stadiums for final games. Promotion and relegation battles are intense across the league. TV broadcasting rights have been secured for all matches. International scouts will attend several key games. Security measures have been enhanced for the final round. Season awards ceremony will follow immediately after the last match. Ticket sales have exceeded expectations.
